name: CodeBlock
description: Block-level code display with optional line numbers, line highlighting, and copy button.
whenToUse: Multi-line code samples, configuration files, CLI output, code documentation.

language.description: Programming language (displayed as data attribute for syntax highlighters).

title.description: Optional title shown in the header bar.

highlightLines.description: Array of 1-indexed line numbers to highlight.

diff.description: Enable diff mode – colors lines by +/- prefix.

route.label: CodeBlock
route.description: Block-level code display with line numbers and copy

examples.title: With Title
examples.code:
<sg-code-block
          title="sigui.config.ts"
          language="typescript"
          code={`import { defineConfig } from "@sig-ui/cli";
export default defineConfig({
  brand: "#6366f1",
  radius: "md",
  density: "comfortable",
});`}
        />

examples.title: Line Numbers
examples.code:
<sg-code-block
          language="typescript"
          showLineNumbers={true}
          code={`import { generatePalette } from "@sig-ui/core/color";
const result = generatePalette("#6366f1", {
  background: "#ffffff",
});
console.log(result.formatted[500]);
// => "oklch(0.585 0.233 264.1)"`}
        />

examples.title: Line Highlighting
examples.code:
<sg-code-block
          language="typescript"
          showLineNumbers={true}
          highlightLines={[3, 4, 5]}
          code={`function setup() {
  const app = createApp();
  app.use(router);
  app.use(store);
  app.use(i18n);
  return app;
}`}
        />

examples.title: CLI Output
examples.code:
<sg-code-block
        title="Terminal"
        language="bash"
        code={`$ bun run build
✓ Compiled 42 components
✓ Generated tokens.css (12.4 KB)
✓ Build complete in 340ms`}
      />

examples.title: Diff Mode
examples.code:
<sg-code-block
          diff={true}
          code={`@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
 import { defineConfig } from "@sig-ui/cli";
 export default defineConfig({
-  brand: "#6366f1",
+  brand: "#8b5cf6",
+  radius: "lg",
   density: "comfortable",
 });`}
        />

examples.title: Diff with Line Numbers
examples.code:
<sg-code-block
          diff={true}
          showLineNumbers={true}
          code={`@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@
 function setup() {
   const app = createApp();
-  app.use(oldPlugin);
+  app.use(newPlugin);
+  app.use(logger);
   return app;
 }`}
        />
